formula: CO = prod(f(Long_Day, GI, FKF1)) * prod(g(CDF1, DELLA)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
FLC = prod(f(FRI, SVP)) * prod(g(VIN3, PRC2, FCA, FPA, FLD, FVE, LD)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
SVP = 1.0 * prod(g(Warm_Temperature, FCA, FVE, SOC1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
PIF4 = prod(f(Warm_Temperature)) * prod(g(DELLA, GI)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
FT = prod(f(CO, PIF4, FKF1, GI, Warm_Temperature, T6P, TPS1)) * prod(g(FLC, SVP, CDF1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
FUL = prod(f(FT, SPL9, SOC1)) * prod(g(TFL1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
SOC1 = prod(f(FT, FD, SPL9)) * prod(g(FLC, SVP, DELLA, AP2, TFL1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
AP1 = prod(f(FT, FD, SOC1, LFY, SPL9, FUL)) * prod(g(AP2, TFL1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
LFY = prod(f(FT, SOC1, AGL24, SPL9)) * prod(g(DELLA, TFL1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Flowering_Time = prod(f(AP1, LFY, SOC1, FT)) * prod(g(TFL1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
